sub_fields.label: Larger subheading ?
sub_fields.name: larger_sub
sub_fields.instructions: Should the subheading be shown same size as main titles?

sub_fields.label: Video
sub_fields.name: mp4
sub_fields.instructions:
Paste the full URL from a video sharing site such as Vimeo or YouTube.
N.B. When sharing from YouTube, related videos will be shown when your video ends. These might be unrelated to your channel or category.

sub_fields.label: Video
sub_fields.name: video
sub_fields.instructions:
Paste the full URL from a video sharing site such as Vimeo or YouTube.
N.B. When sharing from YouTube, related videos will be shown when your video ends. These might be unrelated to your channel or category.

sub_fields.label: Lazy Load Cover Image
sub_fields.name: lazy_load_cover_image
sub_fields.instructions: If this field is entered the video will be loaded on demand when the image is clicked

sub_fields.label: Lazy Load Cover Video
sub_fields.name: lazy_load_cover_video
sub_fields.instructions: If this field is entered the video will be loaded on demand when this video is clicked

sub_fields.label: IFrame
sub_fields.name: iframe
sub_fields.instructions: Paste the whole iframe code provided including opening <iframe> and closing </iframe> tags.

sub_fields.label: Lazy Load Cover Image
sub_fields.name: lazy_load_cover_image
sub_fields.instructions: If this field is entered the IFrame will be loaded on demand when the image is clicked

sub_fields.label: Shortcode
sub_fields.name: shortcode
sub_fields.instructions: Enter any registered shortcode, in the format [shortcode param1="value1"]Inner Content[/shortcode]

fields.label: Gallery
fields.name: gallery
fields.instructions: Grid layout will be automatically placed, depending on order

fields.label: Poster (Loading Image)
fields.name: poster
fields.instructions: Shown while the video is loading. Upload the first frame of the Video, as optimised as possible

fields.label: Poster (Loading Image)
fields.name: poster
fields.instructions: Shown while the video is loading. Upload the first frame of the Video, as optimised as possible

fields.label: Custom ID
fields.name: custom_id
fields.instructions: Enter an ID for this block. Can be used to jump directly to this block when the page is opened. Invalid characters will automatically be removed.

title: [Clonable, Layout Option] Block Spacing

fields.label: Spacing
fields.name: spacing
fields.instructions: Set the spacing above/below this block to a custom multiple. This can only increase the spacing - the default minimum spacing will always be applied.

description: Control 'Content Blocks' spacing on a per block basis
